title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 276.556 - Hearings, director to promulgate rules
text:
276.556.  Hearings, director to promulgate rules. — All hearings provided for in sections 276.401 to 276.581 or in regulations promulgated hereunder shall be held in accordance with the provisions prescribed by the director.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1627 § 31)
